subject_profile.summary: Base country-level assessment; default category weights prioritize rule of law, institutional integrity, and personal freedom.
stated_values: Rule of law and institutional integrity weighted most heavily
Personal freedom and security from arbitrary state action are foundational
Economic success is contingent on rule of law, not a substitute for it

flags: Generated 2026-05-28 under v2.0: multilateral (IMF Art IV, World Bank, ADB, WJP, RSF, TI, V-Dem, Freedom House) + Mongolian independent press.
A genuine parliamentary democracy (a regional rarity) squeezed between Russia and China, on a mining-and-China-export-concentrated economy.

Standout drags: a resource-curse/single-buyer trade model, pervasive corruption, and severe climate exposure; a durable democracy and a young population are offsets. Source-lean: MODERATE-HIGH Anglophone.

economic.notes: Improved fiscals on a mining base, against a resource-curse/single-buyer trade model and a commodity-managed currency.

fiscal_state.notes: Debt cut sharply (~64%→44% GDP) with an upgrade and sovereign-fund building, but coal-price slumps widen deficits and FX-debt/SOE liabilities loom. (IMF 2025 Art IV; World Bank)

monetary_independence.notes: A 'flexible' but commodity/China-managed tugrik, with a high policy rate and a weak central-bank balance sheet. (IMF; Mongolbank)

banking_stability.notes: Concentrated, with elevated NPLs and weak governance, reforms underway. (ADB; World Bank)

trade_actions_capacity.notes: A classic resource curse - copper/coal with ~91% of exports to a single neighbour - a commodity- and single-buyer risk. (IMF; The Diplomat)

institutional.notes: A democracy with usable data, undercut by pervasive corruption.

rule_of_law.notes: A democracy but with pervasive corruption (a major coal-theft scandal) and judicial-independence threats. (TI; UN HRC)

civil_service_capacity.notes: Weak and patronage-driven, with thin capacity. (World Bank; TI)

press_freedom.notes: Relatively free historically but the RSF rank fell sharply, with journalist arrests; a reform bill pending. (RSF; CIVICUS)

political_social.notes: A durable democracy and young population, against coalition churn and corruption-driven discontent.

political_stability.notes: A genuine parliamentary democracy (a regional rarity), with coalition churn and corruption protests but real democratic durability. (Freedom House 2025; East Asia Forum)

civil_liberties.notes: Strong-ish and free, with free assembly and speech and mild erosion. (Freedom House; V-Dem)

treatment_non_citizens.notes: Limited routes; not a relocation destination. (general)

social_cohesion.notes: Cohesive and homogeneous, with inequality and corruption-driven discontent. (World Bank)

geopolitical.notes: A 'third neighbor' balancer constrained by landlocked Russia/China dependence.

alliance_reliability.notes: A 'third neighbor' balancer - pragmatic but constrained, with a recent drift toward China/Russia infrastructure. (Geopolitical Monitor)

conflict_involvement.notes: No conflict, but acute landlocked Russia/China dependence for energy and transit. (The Diplomat)

physical_practical.notes: Severe climate and air-pollution exposure, with poor landlocked infrastructure.

climate.notes: Rapid warming (>2x global), desertification, dzud (extreme winters) collapsing pastoralism, water decline, low readiness. (IPCC AR6; WB CCDR)

healthcare.notes: Weak and capital-concentrated, with rural gaps, improving. (ADB)

infrastructure.notes: Poor, landlocked over vast distances, mining-corridor-focused. (World Bank; ADB)

summary: A genuine parliamentary democracy - a rarity in its neighbourhood - with a young population and improved public finances, but squeezed between Russia and China on an economy that depends on mining and sends roughly 90% of its exports to a single buyer, a classic resource-curse and single-buyer risk. Pervasive corruption (a major coal-theft scandal), a commodity-managed currency, and severe climate exposure - dzud winters, desertification, and the capital's world-worst winter air pollution - weigh against the democratic strength, leaving a balanced outcome distribution.
